content.text:
*[quiet for a second]*

It would look like... exactly this? 

*[small, uncomfortable laugh]*

Like forgetting things. Being behind. Not having answers when my team asks me questions. Snapping at my partner. Going back for my keys three times because my brain is just -- it's not working the way it usually works.

But everyone goes through adjustment periods. New roles are hard. This is just -- this is normal hard, not like, *failing* hard.

*[faster again]*

I just need to get through this month and then I'll have more of a handle on it, and the Thursday meeting -- if I can nail that one it'll buy me some time to get organized and --
